title: Worked Example - Quote Length and Exmpty Check

content.problemStatement:
In this example, we demonstrate how to check the length of a quote using `length()` and `size()`, and verify if the string is empty using `empty()`.

**When executed, the code will show:**

```java
The secret of getting ahead is getting started.
Length of Quote: 47
Size of Quote: 47
Is the string empty? 0
```
